top_signals.title: Japan mulls easing travel advisory for Iran
top_signals.summary: The plan emerged as other countries move to resume business in the Middle East and Japanese companies in the region are calling to lower the travel advisory.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vitalik Buterin shares top priorities for new 'Lean Ethereum' strawmap
top_signals.summary: Part of the Ethereum Foundation’s plan to make Ethereum more private and scalable is to introduce a new virtual machine, with leanISA and RISC-V among the top candidates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Goldman Sachs says these undervalued stocks are 'well positioned' to outperform - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs says these undervalued stocks are 'well positioned' to outperform  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Football may not come home but US investors will still cash cheques here
top_signals.summary: The US continues to invest in the English football pyramid. Matt Bonass gives his best shot at explaining why Football attracting money is not novel, but what has changed is the type of money, where the money has come from and the thinking behind it all. In a previous era club ownership was a passion [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hayabusa2 flies past asteroid as Japan aims to acquire data for planetary defense
top_signals.summary: The encounter marks a new phase for Hayabusa2, which completed its primary mission in 2020 after returning samples from the asteroid Ryugu to Earth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
